speaker: [player]
text: I'm in. Let's do the full Relay.

speaker: Dirtus
text: THE NEW ONE HAS WORM COURAGE.

speaker: Vermia
text: WORM COURAGE! I said that first!

speaker: Grubwin
text: Fine. I'm in. But I'm writing about something real, not about Scatha specifically.

speaker: Dirtus
text: As long as it rhymes with something I can respond to.

speaker: Mawla
text: I'm in. Dirtus — I'm writing free verse. Don't try to make it rhyme-compatible.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I respect your artistic choice. It will be challenging.
